summary: Above‑average front‑of‑house recording captures a solid New England performance with energetic crowd and strong guitar work.
review: The recording, made from Rich Gastwirt’s well‑regarded Schoeps‑to‑DAT front‑of‑house rig, is generally clear aside from some crown noise at the start of Shakedown. The show itself is described as a good performance fueled by a rowdy New England audience, with particularly “wicked sick” guitar playing that can lift any bad mood.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review rates the show and recording positively (4 stars); both performance and audio are judged above average, leading to a high‑ish rating but limited confidence due to only one source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house (FOB) capture with nice Schoeps > DAT rig; crown noise present at the beginning of Shakedown but fades, crowd mic chatter mostly settles.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic New England crowd gave the band extra boost; performance described as solid throughout with strong guitar moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar work called “wicked sick” and a highlight of the show.
